goal: First runnable native Aura shell inside Helium

passes.description: Flip the development bundle from Helium to Aura and swap in the temporary Aura placeholder icon pack.
Introduce Aura-native host controller and BrowserView mounting hooks.
Replace Helium chrome affordances with the canonical Aura address bar and site-controls surface.
Map Helium media sessions into Aura cards and add workspace-theme surface ownership.
Wire spaces, profiles, folders, essentials, menus, split and restore into the rewritten chrome.
